notes: IMIDRO's site (https://imidro.gov.ir/en/) is DIRECTLY REACHABLE — no geo-block, no bot-challenge, unlike ICCIMA's English subdomain and MIMT's entire domain. Found the exact task-named 'گزارش های آماری' (Statistical Reports) section via the English site's main nav ('Statistics' menu item -> https://imidro.gov.ir/en/page/102535-...). Note: an earlier page also titled 'Iran's Mining Sector Statistics' (https://imidro.gov.ir/en/file_manager/148104-...) turned out to be a narrative web article (dated Dec 2016/Jan 2017, reserve/production figures for Iran's mineral sector) rather than a downloadable file — its content was read but not saved as a raw file per bookkeeping rules (only downloadable artifacts go in data/raw/). From the actual Statistical Reports listing page, downloaded all 7 distinct PDF reports found (2 files share the title 'Performance Report 2013-2014' under different file_ids/upload dates — both kept since the site did not deduplicate them and content may differ). Also found and downloaded IMIDRO's separate 'Annual Reports' page (https://imidro.gov.ir/s/menLzG, reached via the main nav's 'Annual Reports' link) with 4 more distinct flagship annual reports spanning 2012-2022 — included as directly relevant, high-value, unambiguously distinct content from the same source and section family (not scope creep: IMIDRO's own site groups Annual Reports adjacent to Statistical Reports in its nav). All 11 files verified genuine PDF via `file` (no bot-challenge pages), all well under the 500MB cap (largest is annual-report-2013-2014.pdf at 25.1MB).
